unsupported_format: The file is not a valid LAS/LAZ point cloud. Accepted formats: georeferenced LAS and LAZ. Export the flight in one of those formats and upload it again.
unreadable_file: The file could not be read: it appears corrupt or incomplete. Re-export it from your photogrammetry software and upload it again.
missing_crs: The file carries no coordinate system information. Export the file with its CRS included and upload it again.
internal_error: An error occurred during processing. You can retry; if it persists, contact the platform operator.
file_too_large: The file exceeds the 50 GB per-survey limit.
unsupported_extension: Unsupported extension. Only .las and .laz files are accepted.
invalid_capture_date: The capture date is invalid. Use the YYYY-MM-DD format.
invalid_size: The declared file size is invalid.
invalid_name: The provided name is invalid (120 characters max).
name_taken: A project with that name already exists.
invalid_crs: The selected coordinate system is invalid.
not_authenticated: You must sign in to continue.
forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
not_found: The requested resource does not exist.
not_ready: Survey results are not ready yet.
not_retriable: Only a survey in failed state can be retried.
